text: Kal raat Papa se bahut zyada behas hui kyunki ek aur rishta mana ho gaya aur wo keh rahe hain ki meri kundali mein hi dosh hai. Main subah se bas roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki ab kal college kaise jaungi ya unka samna kaise karungi. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai main kabhi kisi ke layak nahi ban paungi, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Raat ko Mummy ne kaha ki 'log kya kahenge' ki teen baar rishta laut gaya hai aur ab woh meri bahar nikalne par aur pabandi lagayenge. Meri itni ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki saans phool rahi hai aur main kuch soch hi nahi pa rahi hoon ki unhe kaise samjhaun ki meri padhai zaroori hai. Bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai dimaag mein, dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

Kal raat ki ladaai ke baad Papa ne bol diya ki meri wajah se khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil rahi hai kyunki har rishta rejection par khatam ho raha hai. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, na padhai ho rahi hai na kisi se baat karne ka mann hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri saari mehnat aur sapne sab khatam ho gaye.

Mummy ne kal raat kaha ki caste mismatch ki wajah se ek aur achha ghar haath se nikal gaya aur ab meri umar nikalti ja rahi hai. Main itni dukhi hoon ki mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki is situation ko solve kaise karun, bas dimaag mein wahi kadwi baatein ghoom rahi hain. Lagta hai main bas sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon, bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke.

Raat ki behas ke baad jab Papa ne kaha ki meri 'fitrat' ki wajah se log rishta thukra dete hain, toh mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya. Main bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai. Is waqt main solution ke baare mein soch bhi nahi sakti, bas lag raha hai ki sab khatam ho gaya hai.
